name: War of the Spark

draft.notes: Every pack contains exactly one non-foil planeswalker (an additional foil planeswalker can also appear). Works like Dominaria's legendary slot but mostly invisible: 3/4 of packs have an uncommon planeswalker among the 3 uncommons, and the rare is a planeswalker 1/4 of the time. Pack still totals 3 uncommons + 1 rare. Common foils appear 1 in every 8 packs and displace a common.

statedRates: Common foils 1 in 8 packs. 20 uncommon planeswalkers. Rare slot is a planeswalker 1/4 of the time; planeswalkers slightly more common than other cards of the same rarity.
sourceNotes: Large set. Three basic land variations. Belgian and Japanese printings also documented on page but not modelled. 36 packs per box. Printed in USA and Belgium.
